summary: Tested App Directory feature for super admins. All 14 requested features verified working correctly. Backend API (9 tests) and Frontend UI (10+ feature verifications) all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: App Directory page at /admin/app-directory catalogs all 57 pages in 11 categories

Categories: Public Pages (6), Onboarding (2), Core App (5), Communication Tools (5), Templates & Branding (4), Performance & Analytics (4), Contacts & Leads (5), Profile & AI (5), Settings (5), Administration (15), Subscription (1)
Categories expand/collapse with smooth animation on click
Page cards show: colored icon, name, description, path (monospace), audience, Public badge (for public pages)
Preview button opens page in new tab (web) or navigates (mobile)
Copy Link button copies full URL to clipboard with visual feedback (checkmark + 'Copied' text)
Share button opens Share modal with page info, Email/SMS toggle, recipient fields, custom message, public/auth note
Share via Email sends via Resend API (working)
Share via SMS sends via Twilio API (NOT mocked - real Twilio integration)
SMS toggle correctly switches form fields from Email Address to Phone Number
Public pages show green note: 'This is a public page - no login required to view'
Auth-required pages show orange note: 'Recipient will need to log in to view this page'
Search functionality filters pages across all categories in real-time
App Directory link visible in More > Administration section with subtitle 'Browse & share pages'
Navigation from More page to App Directory works correctly
Back button (chevron) navigates back to previous page
context_for_next_testing_agent: App Directory feature is complete and tested. Key points: 1) Page at /admin/app-directory shows 57 pages in 11 categories, 2) Share endpoint POST /api/admin/app-directory/share supports email (Resend) and SMS (Twilio - real, not mocked), 3) Copy-link logging at POST /api/admin/app-directory/share/copy-link, 4) Requires admin authentication via X-User-ID header, 5) App Directory link visible in More > Administration section for admins.

features_verified.app_directory_loads: PASS - Page loads at /admin/app-directory after login
features_verified.all_11_categories_displayed: PASS - Public Pages (6), Onboarding (2), Core App (5), Communication Tools (5), Templates & Branding (4), Performance & Analytics (4), Contacts & Leads (5), Profile & AI (5), Settings (5), Administration (15), Subscription (1)
features_verified.categories_expand_collapse: PASS - Clicking category header toggles expand/collapse with animation
features_verified.page_cards_content: PASS - Each card shows icon, name, description, path, audience, Public badge (for public pages)
features_verified.preview_button_works: PASS - Opens page in new tab on web
features_verified.copy_link_works: PASS - Copies URL to clipboard with visual feedback
features_verified.share_modal_content: PASS - Shows page info, Email/SMS toggle, recipient fields, custom message, public/auth note
features_verified.share_via_email_works: PASS - Backend API sends via Resend successfully
features_verified.share_via_sms_toggle: PASS - SMS toggle switches Email Address field to Phone Number field
features_verified.search_functionality: PASS - Filters pages across all categories
features_verified.app_directory_link_in_more: PASS - Visible in More > Administration section
features_verified.navigation_from_more: PASS - Clicking App Directory navigates to /admin/app-directory
features_verified.back_button_works: PASS - Back button navigates to previous page

mocked_apis.note: SMS via Twilio is NOT mocked in this environment - it uses real Twilio integration

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features verified working correctly
